C:\d\vs_code\msys2\mingw64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\renderer.dir/objects.a
C:\d\vs_code\msys2\ucrt64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\renderer.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\renderer.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\d\vs_code\msys2\ucrt64\bin\c++.exe -Wl,--undefined=WinMain -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\renderer.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o renderer.exe -Wl,--out-implib,librenderer.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\renderer.dir\linkLibs.rsp
